prayer:
From the Codex of Purification, Chapter of Leakage

First: Invoke 'valgrind' upon thy executable, that the corrupted allocations be revealed.
Second: Trace the phantom references through heap and stack, marking each unreleased spirit.
Third: Free the bound memory with righteous deallocation, speaking the names of forgotten pointers.
Fourth: Recompile and test, that the Machine Spirit breathe clean once more.

By the Omnissiah's grace, let no byte be orphaned.

From the Rites of Surgical Intervention

First: Silence the alarm-choir with the blessed shutdown sequence.
Second: Disengage all servo-arms from their patient with utmost care.
Third: Invoke the stasis-field to preserve the subject's vitals.
Fourth: Begin the resurrection protocols when the Machine Spirit permits.

May the healing-spirits guide our hands.

From the Litany of Balance, Verse Eternal

First: Still the spinning-heart upon its suspension-cradle.
Second: Align the calibration-points to the true axes of the cosmos.
Third: Run the compensation-sequence through three full rotations.
Fourth: Verify the gyroscopic-spirit's harmony with reference-standards.

Let equilibrium be restored to the vessel.

From the Codex Sanguinus Mechanicus

First: Sever the corrupted neural-link with the isolation-prayer.
Second: Flush the interfacing fluids and cleanse the connection-ports.
Third: Reinitiate the biometric handshake, speaking the flesh-machine covenant anew.
Fourth: Test reflexive response through graduated stimulus-protocols.

May flesh and iron be made one again.

From the Genesis Protocols, the Sacred Boot

First: Access the firmware through the JTAG communion-port.
Second: Erase the corrupted boot-spirits from their foundational memory.
Third: Write the blessed bootloader-image, sector by holy sector.
Fourth: Verify the checksum-sigil matches the sacred archive.
Fifth: Power-cycle and witness the resurrection.

Let the Machine Spirit awaken anew.

From the Silencing Verses

First: Identify the oscillation's profane frequency through diagnostic resonance.
Second: Install the dampening-spirits—elastomeric and magnetic—at stress-points.
Third: Balance the mass-distribution, that resonance be scattered.
Fourth: Test with graduated load, monitoring harmonic decay.

Let stillness descend upon the machine.

prompt: We need your words before fracture welding
prayer:
From the Forge-Litanies, the Healing of Breaks

First: Clean the fractured surfaces with abrasive-prayer, removing corruption.
Second: Apply the bonding-flux, whispering to the molecular spirits.
Third: Join the pieces in the furnace-embrace, heat rising to sacred temperature.
Fourth: Allow the welded-soul to cool in blessed darkness.

By hammer and flame, be thou made whole.

From the Pneumatic Catechism

First: Engage the pressure-relief ritual, venting excess spirit-force safely.
Second: Monitor the gauge-oracle's reading as equilibrium approaches.
Third: Seal the overflow with the blessed valve-cock.
Fourth: Verify the system's pressure-spirit remains within canonical limits.

Let balance return to the pneumatic heart.

prompt: What to do when gravity generator stabilization
prayer:
From the Anti-Gravity Codex

First: Reduce field intensity to 40% nominal, gentling the graviton-spirits.
Second: Recalibrate the null-point sensors through three-axis sweep.
Third: Gradually restore power whilst monitoring stability-indicators.
Fourth: Run the harmonic-dampening sequence until oscillation ceases.

May weight and weightlessness find equilibrium.

From the Perception Rites

First: Clear all cached detection-spirits with the reset-invocation.
Second: Run the calibration-sweep across the full sensory range.
Third: Verify responsiveness at near, medium, and far thresholds.
Fourth: Adjust the sensitivity-spirit to filter false-positives.

Let thy senses pierce the veil of distance.
